trigger_mechanism: Fire-and-forget from DteService via AccountingAutomationService (Optional + forwardRef injection)

trigger_events.ON_CREATED: Called at DTE creation (line 306 of dte.service.ts)

tenant_config.autoJournalEnabled: Boolean, default false - must be explicitly enabled per tenant

reversal_mechanism: Void POSTED entry, reverse account balances, record voidReason='Anulación de DTE'
reports_available: GET /accounting/journal-entries (libro diario with filters: status, entryType, dateFrom/dateTo, search)
GET /accounting/reports/general-ledger (libro mayor per account with running balance)
GET /accounting/dashboard (summary: assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses)
feature_gating: Requires 'accounting' feature in tenant plan. Advanced reports require 'advanced_reports'.
issues: Type 07 (Comprobante de Retención) has no accounting mapping - operation not defined
Types 04, 09, 11, 34 completely absent from accounting automation
CREDITO_FISCAL mapping mirrors VENTA_CREDITO (debit Clientes/credit Ventas) - may need review for purchase-side accounting
Hardcoded IVA rate (13%) in normalizeJsonForHacienda - not applicable to all DTE types (e.g., exportaciones=0%, sujeto excluido=no IVA)
No accounting for tipo 11 (Exportación) which has 0% IVA
mappingConfig JSON rules are flexible but require manual setup per tenant - no auto-provisioning for new operations
